meaning: vi.<口>(尤指在白天)小睡,打盹儿vt.懒散地打发日子n.打盹儿,瞌睡
examples: I lay down on the bed with my shoes off to have a snooze.
Then one group took a 90-minute snooze.
When the alarm rings in the morning you find yourself thinking about the snooze button more often.
But the biggest bug, as far as we're concerned, is that the Snooze button is just a thin strip.
